proper functioning of government bodies.
India got independence in the period of Saturn, which was helpful for backward class as the
planet Saturn represents backward classes.
The next question remains whether the policy of reservation will be revoked in India? And
the answer is NO. It will continue to exist, and it will only be altered or modified per se in
future.
From 2009, when India starts its Sun Dasha, we will have better education system. And
major changes are foreseen when Saturn transits Simha from 2006 and 2008.
The recent controversy/policy of cutting down the fees in IIMs is due to the 9th lord dasha.
9th lord symbolizes post graduation according to Indian astrology.
In chaturvimsamsa the Saturn is transiting the 6th house, which brought a policy change
that also leads to some controversies.
FUTURE OF INDIAN EDUCATION
